text: Projecting to this PC Project your Windows phone or PC to this screen, and use its keyboard, mouse, and other devices, too. Add the "Wireless Display" optional feature to project to this PC: Optional features Some Windows and Android devices can project to this PC when you say it's OK Always Off (Recommended) v Ask to project to this PC Every time a connection is requested v Require PIN for pairing Never v This PC can be discovered for projection only when it's plugged into a On PCname DESKTOP-SGIDORO Rename your PC
